source: P3 smoke (Phase 7a wiring): self-computed by the ported core via a throwaway harness (NOT emitter-dumped -- that is P4). LOOSE tolerances proving the BivariateDistribution (Normal copula, two fixed Normal marginals, Inference-From-Margins) copula-parameter fit + seeded ISimulatable<Matrix2D> draw RUN identically across the C++/R/Python harnesses. BivariateDistribution is ISimulatable<Matrix2D> (n-row x 2-col), so the draw is flattened ROW-MAJOR (i = row*2 + col): simulated_value[0]=row0/X, [1]=row0/Y, [2]=row1/X, ... The marginals are pre-fit and held FIXED; only the copula dependency parameter is estimated. P4 replaces these with emitter-dumped exact RMC.BestFit oracles and may TIGHTEN (never loosen).
